title: Grilled British Baked Cod with Herbs
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines the freshness of British cod with a hint of grassy herbs, all baked to perfection.

ingredients.name: Cod fillets (4)
ingredients.notes: Fresh and sustainable cod from British waters

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Grassy and fragrant, adds a nice texture

ingredients.name: Fresh dill
ingredients.notes: Classic British herb, pairs well with fish

ingredients.name: Lemon
ingredients.notes: Brightens up the flavors and adds a nice citrus note

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Pungent and aromatic, adds depth to the dish

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Mild and flavorful, perfect for grilling

ingredients.name: Bake
ingredients.notes: For easy cleanup and even cooking

instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together parsley, dill, and garlic.
Place the cod on the baking sheet and top each fillet with a slice of lemon and a sprinkle of the parsley mixture.
Drizzle with olive oil and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
